SYNTHETIC FIXTURE - NOT A RECORDED DEED. For parser testing only.

Part of the Northeast Quarter of Section 11, Township 15 North, Range 3 East,
Marion County, Indiana, described as follows:

Beginning at the Point of Beginning;

thence North 25 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds East, 320.00 feet;
thence along a curve to the left having a radius of 600.00 feet, a central
angle of 30 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds, an arc length of 314.16 feet, and
a chord bearing North 10 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds East, a chord distance
of 310.58 feet;
thence North 05 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds West, 150.00 feet;
thence South 85 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds East, 250.00 feet;
thence South 25 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds West, 740.00 feet to the Point
of Beginning.
